summary:
Now let me build the HTML pages. I'll start with the home page:
Continuing with the journal page and intent file.
The folio is bound and shelved. Seven HTML chapters plus the shared stylesheet, JavaScript, and `site_intent.json` are in place.

**Summary of the build:**

- **Visual register:** Engraved-folio aesthetic in walnut `#4A2E1F`, parchment `#F2E6D0`, and burgundy `#6B1E2A`, with Cormorant Garamond + IM Fell English (small-caps variant for proper nouns) and ligatures enabled.
- **Engravings:** All instrument plates, house marks, maps, cross-sections, and ornaments are hand-authored inline SVG with hatching patterns, double-rule frames, foliate rosettes, and copperplate captions — no external image dependencies.
- **Required text present:** "The Worshipful Guild of Stringed-Instrument Luthiers", "ESTABLISHED MDCCXIV", "Instrument of the Month", "Journal of Techniques".
- **Visible interactions:** wax-seal hover on nav links (animated burgundy seal scaling beneath each label), workshop directory filter chips (family/region/apprentices, dimming non-matches), sortable materials table, quarter-sawn ↔ flat-sawn billet rotator, footnote parchment tooltips on hover/focus, phonograph-horn toggle, hamburger drawer for mobile, soft fade page-turn between chapters.
- **Responsive:** Two-column folios collapse to single column at narrow widths; sidebar/margin notes reflow; the ribbon nav becomes a parchment drawer.

**Files written:**
- `index.html` — Frontispiece with cartouche, viola d'amore engraving, Warden's preface, three plate-card teasers, instrument-of-the-month strip
- `workshops.html` — Filter ribbon, 12 workshop cards with house marks, engraved foldout map, membership CTA
- `apprenticeship.html` — CAP. III, three-tier timeline with marginal footnotes, engraved petition form
- `materials.html` — Diderot cross-section with callouts, sortable 10-row table, varnish vignette, forester's note, billet rotator
- `exhibition.html` — MMXXVI Cremona banner, Best-in-Show plate, six juried gallery plates, attending list, archive carousel
- `instrument-of-the-month.html` — Tipped-in spread of the Maréchal Theorbo with provenance lineage, phonograph play button, previous-instruments strip
- `journal.html` — Masthead (Vol. CCCX, Issue II), TOC, lead article with two figures and four footnote pop-overs, author colophon, past-issues sidebar
- `css/style.css` — Shared stylesheet
- `js/main.js` — Filters, rotator, table sort, phonograph toggle, page-turn fade, footnote a11y
- `site_intent.json` — Concept manifest
